eng.definition: (of a task or responsibility) involving a great deal of effort, trouble, or difficulty.
examples: The onerous task of cleaning the garage fell to me.
The responsibilities of his new job are very onerous.
Fulfilling the contract's terms became an onerous obligation.

hin.definition: The process of working together to the same end
examples: हमें सहयोग करने की आवश्यकता है.
मैं उसके संगठन के साथ सहयोग कर रहा हूं.
सहयोग सभी समस्याओं का समाधान है.
